crime.value: Shooting murder of Lord Haverly in his library, followed by murder of Lord Byron in his bed
crime.quote: There was a loud bang, and Lord Haverly clutched at his chest as he fell onto the carpet.

victim.value: Lord Haverly, who was about to reveal a discovery/secret that threatened the murderer
victim.quote: I just couldn't have you telling my little secret just yet.

closed_world.value: Victorian English aristocratic society, centered around Haverlin Manor and London social circles
closed_world.quote: your grandmother insisted that we came for the Cortwell's summer soree

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown man with a secret that Lord Haverly's discovery would expose
culprit_and_motive.quote: I just couldn't have you telling my little secret just yet.

investigator.value: Lady Evelyn, Lord Haverly's daughter, working with James to investigate her father's murder
investigator.quote: Do you think he was the Lord B my father was writing to?

suspect_architecture.value: Limited cast established: mysterious shooter with secret connection to Lord Haverly, plus household staff (Darrens butler, Mrs. Middleton cook)
suspect_architecture.quote: You should be grateful though, I atleast came when your wife and lovely daughter were in London.

clue_fairness.value: Reader knows key information: Lord Haverly was about to reveal a discovery, killer has a secret to protect, letter to Lord B connects murders
clue_fairness.quote: I feel we are getting closer and closer to making our discovery known.

social_world.value: Victorian aristocratic hierarchy: Lord and Lady of manor, household staff with formal protocols, London society with soirees and titles
social_world.quote: My lord,there is a man here to see you.

alibi.value: Killer ensures family is away in London during the murder, creating deliberate timing for the crime
alibi.quote: I atleast came when your wife and lovely daughter were in London.

investigator_wound.value: Evelyn investigating her father's murder while missing the safety of home, forced into London society she dislikes
investigator_wound.quote: I just can't stand London after all the fresh air and wide open spaces of Haverlin Manor.

_meta.title: ebook katie r jamison the mystery of haverlin manor in progress
